headline: Bitcoin prices gain on Strategy buy, United Airlines stock dips
summary: Yahoo Finance anchor Josh Lipton tracks Monday's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. Airline stocks, including American (AAL), Southwest (LUV), and United (UAL), are trading lower as grounded flights raise profit concerns. Bitcoin (BTC-USD) prices are inching back toward $70,000 after Strategy (MSTR) bought $1.28 billion worth of the cryptocurrency. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.

headline: United Airlines Faces Fuel Shock Test To Margins And Demand Story
summary: United Airlines Holdings (NasdaqGS:UAL) CEO has warned that a rapid surge in jet fuel prices linked to the Iran conflict is creating a significant financial headwind. The airline, which does not hedge its fuel exposure, expects the spike in fuel costs to affect upcoming quarterly results. Management has indicated that higher fuel expenses could spill over into ticket prices for customers if current conditions persist. United Airlines operates a large global network, so fuel is one of its...

headline: The Winners and Losers of Monday's Selloff
summary: Cruise operators, airlines and bank stocks fell in premarket trading Monday, while energy companies rallied.  As markets brace for a more protracted conflict in the Middle East, investors are rushing to identify the winners and losers from the most severe shock to energy markets since the 1970s.  Travel companies are leading losses in premarket U.S. trading.

raw.headline: The Winners and Losers of Monday's Selloff

Travel companies are leading losses in premarket U.S. trading.

headline: Airline and cruise stocks plunge as oil prices surge on Iran conflict
summary: Investing.com -- United Airlines (NASDAQ:UAL) shares fell 6% on Monday, while American Airlines (NASDAQ:AAL) dropped 5%, Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) declined 4.5%, and Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) slipped 3.8% as companies exposed to high oil prices sold off following a surge in crude prices.
